name: Biscochitos Sandoval
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the lard or shortening and sugar together until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg yolks one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Gradually add the flour and baking powder to the mixture, stirring continuously.
4. Stir in the vanilla, anise, and milk until the batter is combined.
5. Roll out the dough on a floured surface into thin rounds.
6. Cut the dough using shapes such as fleur-de-lis; traditional shapes are recommended.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown, according to Mrs. Sandoval's "Bake by smell" method.
